headline: American Express issued $3.5 billion in combined senior and subordinated notes across four tranches with maturities ranging from 2029 to 2041.
investor_impact: This $3.5 billion debt issuance represents routine balance sheet management and funding operations for the firm. The staggered maturities and mix of fixed-to-floating and floating rate notes will help optimize AXP's cost of capital and interest rate exposure, with no material change to the broader equity thesis.
key_figures: $1,350,000,000 of 4.009% Fixed-to-Floating Rate Notes due February 9, 2029
$1,000,000,000 of 4.456% Fixed-to-Floating Rate Notes due February 10, 2032
$650,000,000 of Floating Rate Notes due February 9, 2029
$500,000,000 of 5.412% Fixed-to-Fixed Rate Subordinated Notes due February 8, 2041
